summary: Block-encoding map for hardware-visible PTO tile/data instructions under the v0.57 block definition.

encoded: Tile compute instructions that execute in TEPL.
Matrix and GEMV instructions that execute in CUBE.
Tile load, store, gather, scatter, and prefetch instructions that execute in TMA.
Tile move, convert, quantize, insert, extract, concat, fill-pad, and transpose instructions that execute in FIXP.

not_encoded.surface: Synchronization, event, flag, barrier, and buffer-token PTO APIs
not_encoded.reason: Scheduling/runtime ordering constructs only. Do not allocate PTO block opcodes.
Runtime or fabric services only. Do not allocate PTO tile/data block opcodes.

not_encoded.surface: Pipe lifecycle and pipe-synchronization PTO APIs
not_encoded.reason: Pipe-handle allocation/transfer/synchronization only. Do not allocate PTO block opcodes.

not_encoded.surface: IR-only virtual, view, metadata, and debug operations
not_encoded.reason: IR lowering or debug constructs only. Do not allocate PTO block opcodes.

encoding_principles: Every PTO instruction form listed in this map is represented by one Linx block record: BSTART.*, descriptors, optional body records, BSTOP.
Multiple PTO spellings may share one encoding row when they differ only by form bits, operand presence, or mode fields.
Tile operands use B.ITP for sources and B.OTA for destinations.
Element-domain shape, valid-region, and mask state use B.META.
Matrix dimensions use B.DIM only when the opcode profile requires M/N/K.
Scalar, memory, dependency, data-attribute, and configuration operands use B.IOR, B.IOD, B.DATR, and B.ARG according to descriptor ownership.

opcode_spaces.TEPL.TileOpcode: Elementwise, tile-scalar, reduce/expand, partition, sort, random, and tile-complex instructions.
opcode_spaces.CUBE.Function: Matrix and GEMV instructions, with suffix variants selected by B.ARG form fields and operand presence.
opcode_spaces.TMA.Function: Load, store, gather, scatter, and prefetch instructions.
opcode_spaces.FIXP.Function: Move, convert, quantize, insert, extract, concat, fill-pad, transpose, and related fixed-pipeline instructions.

supernpubench_issue_14_coverage.summary: The v0.57 block encoding covers all 29 PTO instruction forms named by SuperNPUBench issue #14. TileOP API and compiler lowering coverage is complete for the forms with compiler_api_work_remaining=false.
